content: Just as Hierarchical Virtual Context Management (exemplified by MemGPT) organizes LLM context across tiered memory resources like an operating system, we can frame all goal-directed autonomous agents as systems that rely on hierarchical virtual context management to expand their effective 'cognitive context' beyond their immediate active working memory. This framing leads to a testable hypothesis: reengineering autonomous agents to adopt OS-inspired tiered context management will let them pursue long-horizon complex goals (such as multi-month scientific research or multi-step customer relationship management) far more reliably than standard flat-context agent designs.
